tasks.description: Bronze ingestion - Sales (POS transactions + ERP orders). Writes to brz_freshsip.pos_transactions_raw and brz_freshsip.erp_sales_raw.
Bronze ingestion - Inventory (ERP inventory snapshots). Writes to brz_freshsip.erp_inventory_raw.
Bronze ingestion - Production (IoT sensor events). Writes to brz_freshsip.iot_sensor_events_raw.
Bronze ingestion - Distribution (logistics shipments). Writes to brz_freshsip.logistics_shipments_raw.
Bronze ingestion - Master Data (products, customers, warehouses). Writes to brz_freshsip.erp_products_raw, brz_freshsip.erp_customers_raw, brz_freshsip.erp_warehouses_raw.
Silver transform - Sales transactions (cast, dedup, Delta MERGE upsert). Reads brz_freshsip.pos_transactions_raw. Writes slv_freshsip.sales_transactions.
Silver transform - Inventory stock + reorder points. Reads brz_freshsip.erp_inventory_raw. Writes slv_freshsip.inventory_stock, slv_freshsip.ref_reorder_points.
Silver transform - Production batches and events. Reads brz_freshsip.iot_sensor_events_raw. Writes slv_freshsip.production_batches, slv_freshsip.production_events.
Silver transform - Shipments (cast, dedup, on_time_flag). Reads brz_freshsip.logistics_shipments_raw. Writes slv_freshsip.shipments.

Silver transform - Products (SCD Type 1), Customers (SCD Type 2), Warehouses (SCD Type 1). Reads erp_products_raw, erp_customers_raw, erp_warehouses_raw. Writes slv_freshsip.ref_products, slv_freshsip.customers, slv_freshsip.ref_warehouses.
Gold - Date Dimension (generated, no Silver source). Writes gld_freshsip.dim_date. Gates all Gold fact tables.
Gold - Fact Sales (revenue, COGS, gross margin). Joins slv_freshsip.sales_transactions + ref_products + customers + dim_date. Writes gld_freshsip.fact_sales.
Gold - Fact Inventory Snapshot (reorder alerts, DSI). Joins slv_freshsip.inventory_stock + ref_reorder_points + dim_date. Writes gld_freshsip.fact_inventory_snapshot.
Gold - Fact Production Batch (yield rate, QC pass, downtime). Joins slv_freshsip.production_batches + production_events + dim_date. Writes gld_freshsip.fact_production_batch.
Gold - Fact Shipment (on-time delivery, fulfillment). Joins slv_freshsip.shipments + customers + dim_date. Writes gld_freshsip.fact_shipment.
Gold KPI - Daily Revenue by Product Category and Region (KPI #1). Reads gld_freshsip.fact_sales + slv_freshsip.ref_products + customers. Writes gld_freshsip.kpi_daily_revenue.
Gold KPI - Production Yield Rate by Batch and Line (KPI #3). Reads gld_freshsip.fact_production_batch. Writes gld_freshsip.kpi_production_yield.
Gold KPI - Order Fulfillment Rate and On-Time Delivery % (KPIs #4 and #8). Reads gld_freshsip.fact_shipment + slv_freshsip.customers. Writes gld_freshsip.kpi_fulfillment_rate.
Gold KPI - Inventory Turnover Rate by Warehouse (KPI #2). Reads gld_freshsip.fact_inventory_snapshot + gld_freshsip.fact_sales. Writes gld_freshsip.kpi_inventory_turnover.
